description: Style Note If cool is your middle name, this black duffel bag belongs in your collection. Perfect for gymming sessions or weekend getaways, carry this along wherever you go and flaunt your trendy style statement. Product Details Large and roomy main compartment Two short handles and a detachable shoulder strap One compartment in front and one on the right side with a Velcro closureBrand name embroidered on the front Material and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean damp cloth when needed Size Height: 24 cm Width: 46 cmDepth: 25 cm
